cluster_summary: Operational infrastructure: scheduling, data validation, offline sync, access control, legacy integration. 46 OK / 12 DISCREPANCY / 4 AMBIGUOUS. 32 scheduling-operational, 25 data-validation. Contains cross-platform divergence (23:xx overflow), single-tenant hardcoding (homecare), dead code (ParanoiaMixin override).

facts.claim: 62 rules: 46 OK, 12 DISCREPANCY, 4 AMBIGUOUS; verdicts: 48 NOT_APPLICABLE, 10 UNVERIFIABLE, 2 VERIFIED, 2 DISCREPANCY.
Type: 16 threshold, 13 workflow, 11 formula, 9 validation, 7 decision-tree, 4 eligibility, 2 scoring. Category: 32 scheduling-operational, 25 data-validation.
23:31-23:59 hour overflow (RULE-001): get_hora_cheia emits '24:00'; justOclock parses via moment and silently rolls to '00:00' (drops date). Both unguarded.
Shift boundary 07:00 (RULE-004): times 07:00+ same day, <07:00 next day. Case/When inclusive. No standard; institutional convention.
Offline prescription 3-day (RULE-005, QTD_DIAS=2): dia__gte=(today-2). Priority: DIETA=1, MEDICAMENTO_SOLUÇÃO=2, SN_ACM=3, RECOMENDACAO_ENFERMAGEM=4, RECOMENDACAO=5.
Delete semantics dead code (RULE-017/018): ParanoiaMixin cascade unreachable; SetUpModel overrides. MRO-dependent behavior per model.
Single-tenant hardcoding (RULE-021): offline sync unconditionally set request.empresa=Empresa.objects.get(whitelabel='homecare'). Requires v2 redesign.

PT-BR: SDRA severity (leve/moderada/grave); RASS -5..+4 (VERIFIED); Prescription types (DIETA, MEDICAMENTO_SOLUÇÃO, SN_ACM, RECOMENDACAO_ENFERMAGEM, RECOMENDACAO); Status (liberado); Connectives (da/de/do/das/dos).
Unguarded: RULE-002 IndexError on single-word names; RULE-021 Empresa.get() uncaught (500); RULE-011 silently coerces invalid to 0.

Celery -c 1 (RULE-025): 7 queues serialize (atualizar_trilhas, executar_trilhas, estabelecimento_setor_leito, prescricoes, prescricao_continua, etl_dados_brutos, callprocedure). Consistent across demo/homol/prod.

systemic_issues.summary: 23:31-23:59 overflow unguarded. 07:00 shift boundary sound. Timestamp labeling corruption in offline sync.
ParanoiaMixin.delete() unreachable (SetUpModel overrides). justOclock unused. Maintenance confusion.
RULE-002 IndexError on single-word names. RULE-021 uncaught Empresa.get() (500). RULE-011 masks invalid as 0.
Offline hardcoded to homecare. RULE-022 AND-of-four access. Legacy single-tenant requires v2 redesign.
tempo_atualizacao unit (seconds/ms) unspecified; consuming code absent. UI auto-refresh undefined.
TasyModel forces Oracle routing. save() overwrites using='oracle'. Prevents clean Tasy migration.
